skills.name: requirement-normalizer
skills.summary: Normalizes requirement wording, structure, identifiers, modality, and verification fields.

skills.name: requirement-deduplicator
skills.summary: Detects exact, semantic, and partially overlapping duplicate requirements.

skills.name: requirement-conflict-detector
skills.summary: Detects logical, temporal, permission, data, technology, and quality-target conflicts.

skills.name: scope-boundary-manager
skills.summary: Defines in-scope, out-of-scope, deferred, dependency, and future-option boundaries.

skills.name: requirement-priority-classifier
skills.summary: Classifies requirement priority using value, urgency, dependency, risk, and delivery slicing.

skills.name: requirement-risk-classifier
skills.summary: Scores requirements for ambiguity, complexity, security, compliance, integration, data, and delivery risk.

skills.name: measurable-quality-attribute-builder
skills.summary: Converts quality expectations into measurable scenarios with thresholds, workload, environment, and observation methods.

skills.name: acceptance-criteria-generator
skills.summary: Generates requirement-level acceptance criteria and negative scenarios from approved intent.

skills.name: definition-of-ready-validator
skills.summary: Determines whether the requirement baseline is sufficiently complete and safe for architecture planning.

skills.name: requirement-quality-score
skills.summary: Computes explainable quality scores for completeness, clarity, consistency, testability, traceability, and feasibility.

skills.name: requirements-baseline-and-approval
skills.summary: Creates immutable requirement baselines and manages stakeholder approvals, rejections, and exceptions.

skills.name: requirements-change-impact
skills.summary: Analyzes changes between requirement baselines and determines affected domain, architecture, code, test, data, and delivery artifacts.
